name: AI Era Corp.
summary: AI Era Corp. (formerly AB International Group Corp.) is an intellectual property and movie investment and licensing firm. It acquires and distributes movie and TV show copyrights, licenses its NFT MMM platform, operates the Mt. Kisco Theatre in New York via subsidiary AB Cinemas NY, Inc., and is developing AI-generated content production through the ufilm AI IP. As of August 31, 2025, it holds 19 movie copyrights, 75 TV drama episodes, and 2,577 short-form drama series.
